scripts.build:remote:release: npm run build:remote:wasm && vite build && mkdir -p examples/www/dist/examples/remote/out && cp examples/remote/out/main.js examples/remote/out/main.wasm examples/www/dist/examples/remote/out/
scripts.build:all:release: npm run build:remote:release && npm run build:c:wasm && npm run build:nim:wasm && npm run build:haxe:wasm && mkdir -p examples/www/dist/examples/c/out && cp examples/c/out/main.js examples/c/out/main.wasm examples/www/dist/examples/c/out/ && mkdir -p examples/www/dist/examples/nim/out/wasm && cp examples/nim/out/wasm/main.js examples/nim/out/wasm/main.wasm examples/www/dist/examples/nim/out/wasm/ && mkdir -p examples/www/dist/examples/haxe/out/wasm && cp examples/haxe/out/wasm/Main.js examples/haxe/out/wasm/Main.wasm examples/www/dist/examples/haxe/out/wasm/ && mkdir -p examples/www/dist/bundles && cp examples/www/remote_example.js examples/www/simple_example.js examples/www/pick_example.js examples/www/lua_module_example.js examples/www/nim_example.js examples/www/haxe_example.js examples/www/ansi_output.js examples/www/dist/bundles/
